title: Opposite-Side Castling Attacks
summary: Race to the enemy king with pawns

steps.title: The Pawn Storm
steps.text: When you castle kingside and your opponent castles queenside, you can attack with pawns WITHOUT weakening your own king. Push h4, g4, Nf5, h5, hxg6 — the attack is a pawn storm.

steps.title: Speed Counts
steps.text: Opposite-side castling creates a race: both sides attack each other's king. Whoever opens lines first usually wins. Count tempos — every move matters. "Opposite castling means mate in 20 moves — to somebody."
